heading: Termination of effectiveness
label: 6556 Termination of effectiveness
text: The authority provided by this subchapter terminates effective .October 1, 2023
notes: Amendments2018— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this subchapter for each of fiscal years 2004 through 2008.”Pub. L. 115–334
amendments: Amendments2018— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this subchapter for each of fiscal years 2004 through 2008.”Pub. L. 115–334
